description_long: This is a stylized doll head with a smooth, light beige complexion and exaggerated facial features, including large, wide-set eyes with black pupils, arched eyebrows, and a pronounced nose. The doll has a prominent, glossy black hair styled in a high, voluminous bun at the back, with long, side-swept bangs partially covering the forehead and right eye. The lips are painted a bright red, forming a subtle smile, and there are faint blush marks on the cheeks, giving the face a lively appearance. The ears are small and rounded, positioned low on the sides of the head. The hair is sculpted with visible grooves to mimic strands and has a shiny finish, contrasting with the matte skin. No clothing, body, or accessories are visible, as only the head is present.
description: A stylized doll head with glossy black hair in a high bun, large expressive eyes, and a bright red smile. The face is smooth and lightly blushed, with sculpted hair details and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's large eyes, red lips, side-swept bangs, and subtle blush on the cheeks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the high, voluminous bun and the long bangs covering part of the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full rounded bun and the sculpted hair grooves radiating from the center.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bun, ear, and the way the bangs sweep across the forehead.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; only the head is present.
attribute_pose: Only the head is depicted, upright and facing forward, with no visible body or limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with upturned red lips, wide open eyes, and slightly arched eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Glossy black hair styled in a high, voluminous bun with long, side-swept bangs.
